svg.text: BookStore Platform — Complete Azure AKS Architecture
Browser to Database — Every Component, Every Connection, Every Security Boundary
HTTPS termination • URL path routing • Health probes • DDoS protection • OWASP 3.2 rules
NSG: IN 443/80 from Internet, 65200-65535 from GatewayManager • OUT: to AKS Subnet
App Pool (2x Standard_D2as_v5 Spot) — Application Pods
Istio Ambient Mesh — mTLS STRICT • L4 ztunnel • JWT Validation • AuthorizationPolicy • PeerAuthentication
1 Browser → App GW → Istio GW → UI
↓ All database connections via Private Endpoints ↓
VNet-integrated • SSL enforced • wal_level=logical • Burstable B1ms
Private Endpoint • Standard Tier • Kafka 3.x Protocol
CSRF tokens • Rate limiting buckets • Session cache
Supporting Services — All Private Endpoints • Public Access: DISABLED
Private Endpoint → ESO → K8s Secrets → Pods • RBAC + Workload Identity
Private Endpoint • AcrPull role to AKS • Image scanning
Private Endpoint • Terraform remote state • Versioning enabled
No Privileged Containers • ACR Images Only • No Privilege Escalation • Non-Root UID • Read-Only Root Filesystem
BookStore Platform — Production-Grade E-Commerce on Azure AKS
Terraform IaC • Istio Ambient Mesh • Workload Identity • Private Endpoints • cert-manager • Gatekeeper • Zero-Trust
4 Microservices • 4 PostgreSQL Instances • Event-Driven CDC • Full Observability Stack • OIDC PKCE + CSRF + mTLS
